archetypes.description: For visual artists and image-led practices that need statement, works, proof, and commissions.
archetypes.label: Artist

archetypes.description: For sound-led performers who need media, appearances, booking, and memorable links.
archetypes.label: DJ / Performer

archetypes.description: For makers, craft workers, stylists, and material practices that need process and proof.
archetypes.label: Maker

archetypes.description: For care, healing, coaching, cultural practice, and guided service work.
archetypes.label: Practitioner

archetypes.description: For advisors and solo professionals who need a credible room for offers, proof, and contact.
archetypes.label: Consultant

archetypes.description: For programs, venues, collectives, and organisations that need public trust and pathways.
archetypes.label: Organisation

archetypes.description: For practical local services that need offers, proof, contact, and a memorable first impression.
archetypes.label: Local Business

atmosphere_packs.description: White-space, soft shadows, and museum-paced attention.
atmosphere_packs.label: Quiet Gallery
atmosphere_packs.light_notes: Diffuse top light with soft object shadows.
atmosphere_packs.reduced_effect_notes: Remove grain and keep static diffuse lighting.
atmosphere_packs.texture_notes: Fine paper grain, matte walls, low contrast labels.

atmosphere_packs.description: Dark room, saturated signal lights, and media-forward contrast.
atmosphere_packs.label: Nocturnal Signal
atmosphere_packs.light_notes: Directional neon-like highlights, subdued ambient fill.
atmosphere_packs.reduced_effect_notes: Disable pulsing light and keep static high-contrast panels.
atmosphere_packs.texture_notes: Poster paper, speaker mesh, subtle scanline surfaces.

atmosphere_packs.description: Craft bench warmth, tactile surfaces, and grounded proof.
atmosphere_packs.label: Warm Material
atmosphere_packs.light_notes: Warm side light with practical studio highlights.
atmosphere_packs.reduced_effect_notes: Keep static light, remove drifting dust and texture shimmer.
atmosphere_packs.texture_notes: Timber, ceramic, canvas, and workshop surfaces.

engagement_dynamics.accessibility_notes: Must support keyboard next/previous controls and a reduced-motion static view.
engagement_dynamics.fallback_behaviour: Render all chambers as a stacked vertical page.
engagement_dynamics.label: Chamber Walk

engagement_dynamics.accessibility_notes: Provide list navigation and disable orbit motion when reduced motion is requested.
engagement_dynamics.description: Objects orbit a central identity point and can be opened in focus.
engagement_dynamics.fallback_behaviour: Render orbit objects as grouped cards below the front chamber.
engagement_dynamics.label: Orbit Constellation

engagement_dynamics.accessibility_notes: Objects require semantic labels and predictable focus order.
engagement_dynamics.description: A stable arrangement of meaningful objects opens into details.
engagement_dynamics.fallback_behaviour: Render objects as a service/proof grid.
engagement_dynamics.label: Object Tableau

engagement_dynamics.accessibility_notes: Each portal must have text labels and non-motion reveal states.
engagement_dynamics.description: A sequence of linked portals reveals offers, media, and calls to action.
engagement_dynamics.fallback_behaviour: Render portals as ordered sections with clear headings.
engagement_dynamics.label: Portal Cascade

motion_profiles.compatibility_notes: Best for contemplative, professional, and accessibility-first rooms.
motion_profiles.description: Slow, steady movement with gentle spatial changes.
motion_profiles.label: Calm

motion_profiles.compatibility_notes: Use where atmosphere and narrative entry matter.
motion_profiles.description: Deliberate camera movement and more expressive transitions.
motion_profiles.label: Cinematic

motion_profiles.compatibility_notes: Avoid for quiet professional rooms unless explicitly selected.
motion_profiles.description: High-energy movement suited to signal-led and performance rooms.
motion_profiles.label: Kinetic

motion_profiles.compatibility_notes: Safe fallback for all rooms and reduced-motion contexts.
motion_profiles.description: Simple transitions with minimal camera or object movement.
motion_profiles.label: Minimal

motion_profiles.compatibility_notes: Best for practitioner, organisation, and reflective maker rooms.
motion_profiles.description: Measured, ceremonial transitions that support guided practice.
motion_profiles.label: Ritual

motion_profiles.compatibility_notes: Use for approachable public-facing rooms and creative portfolios.
motion_profiles.description: Responsive, expressive movement with lighter interaction feedback.
motion_profiles.label: Playful

object_skin_packs.description: Framed works, wall labels, plinths, and quiet gallery display objects.
object_skin_packs.label: Gallery Frame Pack

object_skin_packs.description: Posters, audio tiles, gig notices, signal panels, and media portals.
object_skin_packs.label: Signal Tile Pack

object_skin_packs.description: Workbenches, sample boards, process objects, tools, and proof cards.
object_skin_packs.label: Material Studio Pack

room_worlds.description: A calm gallery room for visual work, statements, proof, and commission pathways.
room_worlds.label: Gallery Painter

thumbnail.alt: Quiet white gallery wall with framed works

room_worlds.description: A nocturnal signal room for sound, events, media, booking, and links.
room_worlds.label: Underground DJ

thumbnail.alt: Dark signal wall with music tiles and event notices

room_worlds.description: A warm material studio for skilled work, process, services, and proof.
room_worlds.label: Material Carpenter

thumbnail.alt: Warm workshop table with samples and proof cards
